Quick Actions
Weekly Usage
MTWTFSS

Email Lookup

Search by email — breach history, social profiles, reputation.

Powered by OSINTdog — Universal search + SEON email intelligence + LeakCheck v2 breach data.
Enter an email to begin lookup.

Username Lookup

Search a username across dozens of platforms.

Powered by OSINTdog — Universal search + LeakCheck breach history + direct platform profile links.
Enter a username to search.

Discord Lookup

Lookup a Discord user by ID or username.

Powered by OSINTdog — IntelFetch Discord intelligence + BreachVIP Discord ID search.
Enter a Discord ID to begin lookup.

Phone Lookup

Carrier, type, region, and spam score.

Powered by OSINTdog — SEON phone intelligence + Melissa enrichment + Universal breach search.
Enter a phone number to begin lookup.

IP Lookup

Geolocation, ASN, ISP, VPN detection. Uses ip-api.com (free).

Enter an IP to begin lookup.

TikTok Lookup

Public profile, follower count, and video stats.

Powered by OSINTdog — Username breach check + direct TikTok profile link.
Enter a TikTok username to begin.

Domain / WHOIS Lookup

WHOIS, registrar, DNS, and certificate history.

Powered by OSINTdog — Universal search + LeakCheck domain breach data.
Enter a domain to begin lookup.

GitHub Lookup

Profile, repos, commit email harvesting, and social links.

Powered by OSINTdog GitHub OSINT + IntelFetch + GitHub public API. Harvests commit emails from public repos.
Enter a GitHub username to begin.

Stealer Logs / Breach Search

Search breach databases and stealer log collections.

Powered by OSINTdog — LeakCheck v2 (200 results) + Dropbase multi-source OSINT. Supports email, username, password, domain.
Enter a query to search breach data.

Crypto Wallet Lookup

Wallet balance, transaction history, and fund flow analysis.

Powered by Blockchain.com (BTC, free) + OSINTdog breach search. Add Etherscan key for ETH balance.
Enter a wallet address to analyze.

Minecraft Lookup

UUID, skin, and profile — Mojang API (free, no key needed).

Enter a username or UUID to begin.

Live Chatroom

Real-time chat with other StalkSint users — messages are shared platform-wide.

Global Chat
— online
Connecting to chat...

Cypher Dynamics

Search Cypher Dynamics threat intelligence and stealer log data.

Powered by Cypher Dynamics via OSINTdog — stealer logs, threat intelligence, credential dumps.
Enter a search term to query Cypher Dynamics.

Discord Monitor

Monitor Discord user activity and collect intelligence via Discord Monitor API.

Powered by OSINTdog Discord Monitor — activity tracking, server history, mutual servers, message patterns.
Enter a Discord User ID to begin monitoring.

Court Records Search

Search public court records and legal case history via IntelFetch.

Powered by IntelFetch via OSINTdog — public court records, legal cases, filings.
Enter a name or address to search court records.

NPD — National People Database

Search the National People Database for individual records.

Powered by IntelFetch NPD via OSINTdog — name, address, and location-based people search.
Enter a first and last name to search.

Fetchbase Breach Database

Search the Fetchbase breach database for leaked credentials.

Powered by Fetchbase via IntelFetch / OSINTdog — massive breach database, leaked credentials and personal data.
Enter a query to search Fetchbase.

Enterprise Database Intelligence

Search enterprise/corporate databases for business intelligence.

Powered by IntelFetch Enterprise via OSINTdog — corporate/enterprise database intelligence search.
Enter a company domain or name to search.

INF0SEC Intelligence Platform

Multi-module intelligence platform — search across all available INF0SEC modules simultaneously.

Powered by INF0SEC via OSINTdog — multi-module OSINT platform. Parallel queries across all available modules.
Select a module and enter a query to begin.

CSINT INF0SEC Intelligence

Multi-module breach intelligence via CSINTDuck — search leaks, NPD, CFX, HLR, and GitHub.

Powered by CSINTDuck / BreachHub — infostealer logs, NPD, phone carrier lookup, crypto exchange, and GitHub reconnaissance.
Select a module and enter a query to begin.
